title: TEL Minor Delays - Woodlands North to Bayshore

title_translations.zh-Hans: TEL 轻微延误 - Woodlands North 至 Bayshore
title_translations.ms: TEL Kelewatan Kecil - Woodlands North ke Bayshore
title_translations.ta: TEL சிறிய தாமதம் - Woodlands North முதல் Bayshore வரை

updates.text: 07:18-TEL-Minor delay affecting train station services between Woodlands North and Bayshore stations (both directions). Commuters can continue to use the train service or consider free bus services at affected stations.
